subcodes.first_line: O Hashim! Hearken unto the call of Him Who migrated unto God, with His soul and His loved ones, until He fell beneath the talons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هاشم اسمع ندآء من هاجر الی الله بنفسه و احبائه الی ان وقع تحت مخالیب
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
